headline: Brown Advisory Large-Cap Growth Strategy Q1 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: Netflix outperformed during the period as investor concerns around a potential acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery subsided.

headline: Why TransDigm (TDG) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company TransDigm (NYSE:TDG) fell 3% in the afternoon session after the company announced it had priced an incremental $1.5 billion in new debt.
